---
name: Fork question
about: You're forking Inkwell and need help getting unstuck
title: "[fork-help] "
labels: fork-help
assignees: ''
---

## What you're trying to do

The end state you're aiming at — e.g. "stand up a research lab at example.org with a `papers/` collection and KaTeX rendering."

## Where you're stuck

The specific step or behavior that isn't working. Error messages, screenshots, or commit links if you have them.

## What you've tried

- [ ] Read `FORK-GUIDE.md`
- [ ] Read `README.md` and `inkwell.config.example.ts`
- [ ] Searched existing issues
- [ ] Searched the docs (`docs/` directory)
- [ ] Tried a clean install (`rm -rf node_modules && npm install`)

Anything else worth knowing about your environment, fork, or local patches.

## Notes

Fork-help questions can also go in **GitHub Discussions** if/when that's enabled on this repo. Use this issue template if Discussions isn't available, or if you think the answer should be permanent (i.e. likely turns into a doc fix or substrate gap).
